description: Gen-1: Spin-wait pause in virtio-net/blk/timer/kvm, 64-bit MMIO stores, branchless LFB font rendering, rep stosq/movsq screen clear and glyph copy, MSI-X loop hoist, IOAPIC mfence, bus table prefetch

virtio-net: 64-bit MMIO stores replace 6x rol+stosd pairs (RX and TX queue setup)
prefetchnta in RX descriptor population loop
prefetchnta in TX descriptor population loop
test al,al replaces cmp al,0 in all loops
virtio-blk: 64-bit MMIO stores replace 3x rol+stosd pairs (queue setup)
pause in I/O completion spin-wait (critical hot path)
lfb: shl al,1; jc replaces rol al,1; bt ax,0; jc (branchless font rendering)
rep stosq replaces rep stosd for screen clear (2x throughput)
rep movsq replaces rep movsd for glyph copy (2x throughput)
prefetchnta for glyph data (2 cache lines)
push/pop rbx added for 64-bit fill pattern register safety
test rcx,rcx replaces cmp rcx,0 in output loop
timer: pause in HPET delay spin-wait loop
jb loop replaces jae end + jmp loop (single branch)
msi: APIC address loaded once outside MSI-X entry loop (was re-reading every iteration)
dec cx; jnz replaces dec cx; cmp cx,0; jne
ioapic: mfence between MMIO register select write and value read
mfence between MMIO register select write and value write
